# mtncloud_budget (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud budget by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_budget" "annual" {
  name = "annual-cap-2026"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the budget to look up.

### Read-Only

- `currency` (String) Currency code of the budget.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the budget is enabled.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the budget.
- `interval` (String) Budget interval.
- `year` (String) Calendar year of the budget.
